query: most recent Summer Olympic Games host city and year
answer: The most recent Summer Olympic Games were held in 2024 in Paris, France. This was the third time Paris hosted the Summer Olympics.

results.title: Summer Olympics by host city 1896-2024 - Statista
results.snippet: In 2024, Paris is set to host the Summer Olympics for the third time since their creation in 1896. The French capital and London have hosted the most Games.
